metadata.name: pylint-flask
metadata.summary: pylint-flask is a Pylint plugin to aid Pylint in recognizing and understanding errors caused when using Flask

modules.name: test.input.func_noerror_flask_ext_bare_as
documentation: Ensure that pylint finds the exported methods from flask.ext.

modules.name: test.input.func_noerror_flask_ext_long_sandwhich
documentation: Ensure that pylint finds the exported methods from flask.ext.

modules.name: test.input.func_noerror_flask_ext_long
documentation: Ensure that pylint finds the exported methods from flask.ext.

modules.name: test.input.func_noerror_flask_ext_wtf
documentation: Ensure that pylint finds the exported methods from flask.ext.

modules.name: test.input.func_noerror_flask_2_ext
documentation: Ensure that pylint finds the exported methods from flask.ext.

functions.name: pylint_flask.register
documentation:
register is expected by pylint for plugins, but we are creating a
transform, not registering a checker.

functions.name: pylint_flask.copy_node_info
documentation:
Copy information from src to dest

Every node in the AST has to have line number information.  Get
the information from the old stmt.

functions.name: pylint_flask.mark_transformed
documentation: Mark a node as transformed so we don't process it multiple times.

functions.name: pylint_flask.is_transformed
documentation: Return True if `node` was already transformed.

functions.name: pylint_flask.transform_flask_from_import
documentation:
Translates a flask.ext from-style import into a non-magical import.

Translates:
    from flask.ext import wtf, bcrypt as fcrypt
Into:
    import flask_wtf as wtf, flask_bcrypt as fcrypt

functions.name: pylint_flask.is_flask_from_import
documentation: Predicate for checking if we have the flask module.

functions.name: pylint_flask.transform_flask_from_long
documentation:
Translates a flask.ext.wtf from-style import into a non-magical import.

Translates:
    from flask.ext.wtf import Form
    from flask.ext.admin.model import InlineFormAdmin
Into:
    from flask_wtf import Form
    from flask_admin.model import InlineFormAdmin

functions.name: pylint_flask.is_flask_from_import_long
documentation: Check if an import is like `from flask.ext.wtf import Form`.

functions.name: pylint_flask.transform_flask_bare_import
documentation:
Translates a flask.ext.wtf bare import into a non-magical import.

Translates:
    import flask.ext.admin as admin
Into:
    import flask_admin as admin

functions.name: pylint_flask.is_flask_bare_import
documentation: Check if an import is like `import flask.ext.admin as admin`.
